item.title: Version 0.5.1
item.description:
minRender 0.5.1

  • Priority & drag-to-reorder fixes — dragging jobs in the queue works again, can cross priority groups (the job adopts the target's priority), and the selection highlight follows the dragged job.
  • Edit Job fix — corrected a flag misalignment when seeding the job editor that could corrupt chunk resubmits.
  • Staging copy-back hardening — workers now own output-directory creation, retry delivery, and no longer complete silently on copy failures.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
minRender 0.5.0

  • Frame preview — click frames or chunks in the grid to preview rendered EXR/PNG/TIFF output right in the monitor, with an EXR layer picker. Works from any node.
  • Edit Job — change a submitted job's parameters and apply to the next chunks, restart in-flight work, or start over. Edits are acknowledged by the leader and queue to the farm share if it's unreachable.
  • Stop chunk & resubmit — stop a chunk (its frames leave the progress accounting; the job finishes "partial") and resubmit it as a new job with different parameters, e.g. one frame per node.
  • UI overhaul — tabbed detail pane, modal submission, resizable columns, durations, selectable node rows, async farm cleanup with per-section select-all, and a Show in Finder button for logs.
  • Farm reliability — nodes advertise capabilities across versions; a render fence prevents double-rendered frames after edits or connection flaps; VPN-friendly timeouts stop remote nodes from being flagged dead.

Rolling upgrade safe: older nodes keep working unchanged; version-dependent features stay disabled until the leader updates.
